text: Stale status corrections belong in normalizeFormData(), not in component mount effects. By extracting the EC object to a rawEc variable first and applying the downgrade before returning, the correction runs on every data load (initial mount, project switch, etc.) with zero component coupling. The shared energyCertificateValidation.ts util is the single source of truth — normalizeFormData imports from it so the downgrade logic stays in sync with validation rules automatically.
issue: Projects saved with status='completed' before per-step validation was added continued to show green on the review page even when required fields were empty.
